figures.name: diag_01_split_balance
figures.description: Set-a-only class balance, synthetic noisy-poor counts, and source-record leakage check.
figures.report_candidate: Strong report candidate for methods/QC appendix.

figures.name: diag_02_qrs_detector_counts
figures.description: wqrs/eplimited count plausibility, detector agreement, and bSQI lead-level behavior.
figures.report_candidate: Good appendix candidate when discussing QRS alignment risk.

figures.name: diag_03_feature_integrity
figures.description: 84-feature nonfinite/range/scale checks.
figures.report_candidate: Good methods appendix candidate.

figures.name: diag_04_pooled_sqi_distributions
figures.description: Pooled feature distributions by label for all seven SQIs.
figures.report_candidate: Useful appendix candidate; can support explanations of fSQI/basSQI gaps.

figures.name: diag_05_lead_median_profiles
figures.description: Median SQI values by lead and label.
figures.report_candidate: Useful for appendix or internal validation.

figures.name: diag_06_normalization_train_test
figures.description: Train/test distribution check before and after normalization for lead-II sSQI and kSQI.
figures.report_candidate: Internal QC; mention only if normalization needs defense.

figures.name: diag_07_noise_allocation_snr
figures.description: NSTDB segment allocation, em/ma balance, and example per-lead SNR checks.
figures.report_candidate: Good methods/QC appendix candidate.

figures.name: diag_08_resampling_wave_psd
figures.description: Raw 500 Hz versus resampled 125 Hz waveform and PSD comparison.
figures.report_candidate: Internal QC; useful if preprocessing details are challenged.

figures.name: diag_09_qrs_overlay_12lead
figures.description: 12-lead ECG with cached wqrs and EP Limited detections.
figures.report_candidate: Good appendix candidate for detector validation.

figures.name: diag_10_raw_seta_qc
figures.description: Raw Set-a 500 Hz waveform, per-lead amplitude spread, and PSD sanity check.
figures.report_candidate: Good preprocessing appendix candidate.

figures.name: diag_11_resample_alias_reference
figures.description: Current 125 Hz cache versus steep reference resampling error plots.
figures.report_candidate: Strong preprocessing/QC appendix candidate.

figures.name: diag_12_noise_wave12_gallery
figures.description: Full 12-lead paper-aligned em/ma synthetic noise residual gallery.
figures.report_candidate: Strong augmentation appendix candidate.

figures.name: diag_13_single_feature_auc_top20
figures.description: Top-20 single-feature SQI separability across the current paper-aligned 84-feature table.
figures.report_candidate: Good analysis figure for feature behavior.

figures.name: diag_14_qrs_hr_by_lead
figures.description: HR-by-lead boxplots and pooled HR distributions from the current QRS cache.
figures.report_candidate: Good detector sanity appendix candidate.
